studies.title: Evaluation of "Invirto aftercare" for anxiety disorders: a pilot study.

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'Invirto aftercare,' which is a clear variation of the product name 'Invirto - Die Therapie gegen Angst.' This strongly suggests the study is specifically about the described digital therapeutic product. However, the abstract and intervention details are not available, which slightly reduces confidence.

_classification.reason: The study title suggests it is a pilot evaluation of an aftercare program, which is more likely to involve observational or real-world data rather than a controlled, randomized design. However, the lack of detailed information limits confidence.
